alias: Fix C from bridge_collapse soft-lock report

notes.case_found: questsAny ALSO requires completion. Verified at sceneRegistry.js:352-353 — predicate is `req.questsAny.some((qid) => completedIds.includes(qid))`. So Option 1 (questsAll → questsAny) would be functionally identical for a single-element list and would NOT break the circular lock.
notes.option_taken: Plan B — added new predicate `questsAnyOrActive` that matches if ANY listed quest is either in completedQuests OR is the player's currently active quest. Updated MountainScene to use it.
notes.rationale: Plan B fits within the single-file constraint (sceneRegistry.js only — predicate logic, hint logic, and the MountainScene config all live in this file). Verified `state.activeQuest.id` is the canonical shape across the codebase (gameHud.js:16, OverworldScene.js:290, foragingSystem.js:192, etc.). No new top-level deps. No save migration needed (existing saves with bridge_collapse already in completedQuests still satisfy the new predicate).
diff_summary: MountainScene.unlockReq.hint: 'Master material science (complete "The Bridge That Broke")...' → 'Start material science (begin "The Bridge That Broke")...'
isSceneUnlocked(): added questsAnyOrActive branch checking completedIds OR state.activeQuest.id
getUnlockProgress(): added questsAnyOrActive condition emitting 'Start or complete one of: ...' label when not met
JSDoc on isSceneUnlocked() updated to list the new predicate
notes.scope_compliance: Single file, JS-only, no new deps. All logic for the new predicate fits inside sceneRegistry.js (predicate evaluator + hint formatter + scene config all colocated).
